commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual/contributor follow-up is needed because automation cannot supply the external PR author's required real Telegram proof.; Cleared: The diff only changes Telegram TypeScript rendering logic and tests, with no dependency, workflow, secret, package, or supply-chain surface added. (sha=d1cbfecfc076a38a4ce882986b16e2aa70e65229)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram progress draft preview rendering and tests so non-rich progress previews use plain readable text instead of Telegram HTML/code-wrapper payloads, while rich previews still use escaped HTML behind the rich-message path.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests -16. Total -14 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main returns non-rich Telegram progress draft previews as HTML parse-mode payloads, and the existing tests assert HTML/code rows; no live Telegram reproduction was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual/contributor follow-up is needed because automation cannot supply the external PR author's required real Telegram proof.

target.title: fix(telegram): render progress draft rows as plain readable text
target.body:
## Summary Fixes #95002. Telegram progress draft previews now keep their canonical preview text plain and readable instead of making ordinary tool/progress rows depend on Telegram HTML/code wrappers. Before this change, progress drafts asserted payloads like: ```html Shelling
🛠️ Exec command false exit 2 ``` After this change, the same draft is represented as readable plain text: ```text Shelling 🛠️ exit 2; command false ``` ## Problem The Telegram progress draft renderer used ``, ``, ``, and `
` for transient progress rows. This made command/tool progress noisy even when HTML parsed successfully, and any fallback/sanitized rendering could expose transport markup to the user instead of a useful status line. ## Changes - Stop wrapping Telegram progress draft lines in Markdown backticks/code spans. - Normalize Telegram progress draft rows to plain readable text first. - Keep non-rich Telegram progress drafts as plain text payloads instead of `parseMode: "HTML"` payloads. - Preserve rich-message support by continuing to build escaped HTML from the same normalized plain line model when rich messages are enabled. - Update Telegram dispatch tests to assert readable progress draft text instead of HTML/code payloads. ## Verification Local targeted checks: ```bash node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-telegram.config.ts telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-telegram.config.ts telegram/src/draft-stream.test.ts telegram/src/lane-delivery.test.ts git diff --check ``` Results: - `telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.test.ts`: 129 passed - `telegram/src/draft-stream.test.ts`: 46 passed - `telegram/src/lane-delivery.test.ts`: 41 passed - `git diff --check`: passed ## Risk Low-to-moderate Telegram presentation risk: - This intentionally changes Telegram progress draft preview text from HTML-formatted rows to plain readable rows. - Final answer rendering is not changed. - Normal Telegram markdown/HTML answer rendering remains outside this progress-draft path. - Rich progress previews still get escaped HTML generated from the normalized plain line model. ## Not addressed This PR does not change Telegram draft materialization policy, including first-preview debounce/minimum length or progress-mode answer-lane suppression. That separate behavior is tracked in #95004 because it involves a product tradeoff between notification noise and Web preview parity. ## Real behavior proof - **Behavior or issue addressed:** Telegram progress draft preview rows no longer expose HTML/code-style transport formatting for ordinary tool progress. The after-fix preview text is readable plain status text. - **Real environment tested:** Linux local OpenClaw checkout on this PR head. - **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran the patched Telegram progress-preview path locally and captured the resulting preview payload text for the issue examples. - **Evidence after fix:** Copied terminal output from the patched local checkout: ```text after-fix Telegram progress preview payload: Shelling 🛠️ exit 2; command false After-fix non-command progress preview payload: Shelling 🔎 Web Search: docs lookup • tests passed ``` - **Observed result after fix:** The preview payload contains readable progress lines and no ``, ``, ``, or `
` transport markup in the non-rich Telegram draft text path. - **What was not tested:** Live Bot API delivery in a public chat was not exercised for this formatting-only patch; final answer rendering is outside the changed progress-draft path.
target.author: snowzlmbot

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
